chapter_title.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Abdullah Ibn Sinan

text: و ما كان فيه عن عبد اللّه بن سنان فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عبد اللّه بن جعفر الحميريّ، عن أيّوب بن نوح، عن محمّد بن أبي عمير، عن عبد اللّه بن سنان، و هو الّذي ذكر عند الصّادق عليه السّلام فقال: أما إنّه يزيد على السنّ خيرا.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Everything in this book that is narrated from Abdullah ibn Sinan has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Abdullah ibn Ja'far Al-Himyari, from Ayyub ibn Nuh, from Muhammad ibn Abi 'Umayr, from Abdullah ibn Sinan. He is the one who was mentioned in the presence of Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as), and the Imam said: "Indeed, he surpasses old age in goodness."
